calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Daniel L. Scher and James A. Michel, Esq. represented Defendant Sonya Maynor. The case settled per written stipulation of parties. Case settled and trial date is vacated.

MOTION To Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Quash The Writ Of Possession Ofdeft Sonya Maynor
Off Calendar Mar-11-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

*DEFENDANT SONYA MAYNOR'S MOTION To Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Quash The Writ Of Possession Of defendant Sonya Maynor -- O F F C A L E N D A R -- clerical error. Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, #4780 (DAG/301)

Notice Of New Hearing Date On Motion To Vacate Default
Off Calendar Mar-04-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: James A. Michel, Esq. 951-4949, for defendant and moving party Sonjya Maynor.
* DEFENDANT SONYA MAYNOR's Motion To Vacate Default-The court adopted its tentative ruling -- Granted. Defendant to answer and post one month's rent with Court by 3/10/2003. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, #4780 (DAG/301/CW)
